title: Review: contact_set atomicity + SpaceRole enum fixes
notes: Confidence: ~5% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: no integration test hitting the daemon HTTP layer end-to-end (all tests are in-process), and the relay.rs silent-coercion path has no test. Would raise confidence if: (1) a test exercises dispatch_peer_group_update with an unknown role string, (2) update_contact_fully has a unit test for the (None,None) case documenting the state-bump behavior. Section 0: no correctness bugs filed — all correctness fixes are verified by tests with independent oracles (DB reads after patch). Section 1: two P1 items. Not bikeshedding.
